input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.3.13.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.3.13.3
            TITLE: teams may be required to bring a copy of the cost report and cost addendum to cost judging

            CONTENT:
            rule S.3.13.3: Teams may be required to bring a copy of the Cost Report and Cost Addendum to Cost Judging
S.3.13.3 Teams may be required to bring a copy of the Cost Report and Cost Addendum to Cost Judging

final_answer: S.3.13.3 Teams may be required to bring a copy of the Cost Report and Cost Addendum to Cost Judging
